0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3.11.0 installs in one command. This is the only guide you need — every other page links here."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"For AI Agents"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If you are an LLM agent installing Mnemosyne for a user, copy the block that matches the deployment target. Each block is self-contained and ends with a verify step."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Standard Python SDK (any agent, includes semantic search):"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent plugin (most common — bundles core + embeddings automatically):"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-hermes\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"All features (embeddings + local LLM + MCP):"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Verify after install:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For the detailed walkthrough (pipx, virtualenvs, MCP server setup, smoke test), see the sections below."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}]," — ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python3 --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pipx"}]," — ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install pipx && pipx ensurepath"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["That's it. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," gives you semantic vector search + local LLM consolidation. No database setup, no config files — Mnemosyne creates its SQLite database automatically on first use."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For speed:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"export PIPX_DEFAULT_BACKEND=uv\npipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Why pipx?"}]," Isolated virtualenv that survives system rebuilds, clean uninstall, no conflicts with other Python projects."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python3 -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 3.7.0\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrade"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extras"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"RAM"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Bare install"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 keyword search only. Good for Raspberry Pi or remote embedding API."}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50 MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed + sqlite-vec for semantic vector search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~800 MB more"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"ctransformers for local LLM sleep consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~600 MB more"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything: embeddings + LLM consolidation. Recommended for 8 GB+ systems."}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~1.5 GB total"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"To use pipx with extras"}],": ","$L3"," (quotes required around brackets)."]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14"],["$L15"],"$L16"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
3:["$","code",null,{"children":"pipx install 'mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]'"}]
4:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent users"}],": install ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pipx install mnemosyne-hermes"}]," instead — this bundles ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," automatically. See full instructions on the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/api/hermes-plugin","children":"Hermes Plugin page"}],"."]}]
5:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
6:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python3 -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"Smoke test:"}]
8:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmem.remember(\"Installation test\", importance=0.1)\nresults = mem.recall(\"test\")\nprint(f\"Stored and retrieved {len(results)} memory\")\n"}]}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server Setup"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne includes a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients:"}]
b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to Claude Desktop config (claude_desktop_config.json):\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}]
e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin, see the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/api/hermes-plugin","children":"Hermes Plugin"}]," page for the complete setup guide including config and troubleshooting."]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Quick commands:"}]
11:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx install mnemosyne-hermes\nhermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne\nhermes gateway restart\n"}]}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
13:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"git clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\npython3 -m venv .venv\nsource .venv/bin/activate\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n"}]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — source changes take effect immediately."]}]
